title: PagedAttention & vLLM
content:
# Interview Prep: PagedAttention

## Q1: Explain how PagedAttention enables memory sharing during parallel generation tasks (like beam search).

### Standard Answer
During beam search, different candidate paths share a common prefix. PagedAttention maps the logical blocks of these paths to the same physical memory block. The block is duplicated only when a write operation occurs (Copy-on-Write), saving memory.
